positive: Symmetrical, centered illustration of a mystical celestial woodland scene. A colossal crescent moon hangs over stylized forest canopy, featuring bioluminescent glowing flora and ethereal root systems. Include graceful, highly contrasted silhouettes of woodland fauna (e.g., owls, deer) integrated into the pattern. The artwork must utilize intricate, clean linework in a sophisticated vector illustration style. Limited, harmonious color palette dominated by midnight blues, deep indigos, glowing aquamarines, and silver accents. The composition should be dense yet breathable, suitable for printing as a clean graphic emblem on apparel. Strong contrast, central focal point, magical, ethereal.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, watercolor, photography, realistic, logo, watermark, text, writing, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, malformed anatomy, poorly rendered, low contrast, clutter, border
